payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Narrow, beige-painted vertical picture frame shown as an edge-cropped partial view: left frame molding visible with a matte/light wood or painted finish and a dark, glossy interior (framed glass or dark mat) that contains faint warm-colored reflections and indistinct details; appears close to camera (approximately 0.8 m).
